body:
This term has no enzyme xref: 

id: GO:0043713
name: (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: 2-oxoisocaproate + NADH + H+ = (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate + NAD+." [GOC:jl, PMID:16957230]
is_a: GO:0016616 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-OH group of donors, NAD or NADP as acceptor


But "(R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase" is a synonym of EC:1.1.1.345 D-2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase (NAD(+)), which equates with this GO term:

id: GO:0140175
name: (2R)-2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase (NAD+) activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: a (2R)-2-hydroxycarboxylate + NAD+ = a 2-oxocarboxylate + NADH + H+." [RHEA:35643]
xref: EC:1.1.1.345 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: RHEA:10052 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
xref: RHEA:35643 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: RHEA:57408 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
xref: RHEA:70327 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
xref: RHEA:86067 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
xref: RHEA:86071 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
is_a: GO:0016616 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-OH group of donors, NAD or NADP as acceptor
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/30138" xsd:anyURI

Also, a search of CHEBI with '(R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate' returns:
CHEBI:55534 - (R)-2-hydroxy-4-methylpentanoic acid

And one of the narrowMatch RHEA xrefs is:
RHEA:10052
(2R)-hydroxy-4-methylpentanoate + NAD(+) = 4-methyl-2-oxopentanoate + NADH + H(+)

and (2R)-hydroxy-4-methylpentanoate (CHEBI:55535) is the conjugate base of (R)-2-hydroxy-4-methylpentanoic acid (CHEBI:55534).


So....I think GO:0043713 (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase activity should be obsoleted and replaced by GO:0140175 (2R)-2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase (NAD+) activity

GO:0043713 (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase activity has 0 annotations anyway.

comments.body:
Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete GO:0043713 (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase activity.

* The reason for obsoletion is that this term is equivalent to GO:0140175 (2R)-2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase (NAD+) activity.

There are no experimental annotations to this term.
There are X InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to this term. 
This term is not present in any subset.

This term is being replaced by GO:0140175 (2R)-2-hydroxyacid dehydrogenase (NAD+) activity

If obsolete term has a 'consider' term:  (optional)
Annotations can be transferred to [suggested GO term(s)] 

Any comments can be  added to the issue: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-ontology tracker]. 
Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks,

🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25062447162)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*

title: Obsolete GO:0043713 (R)-2-hydroxyisocaproate dehydrogenase activity
